name: Read Data
description: Read data from a collection in the database.
doc:
Query data from a SQLite collection.

Filtering:
• No filter - returns all records in collection
• JSON filter - match specific field values
  Example: {"status": "active"}
  Example: {"category": "images", "processed": true}

Output:
Returns array of matching records, each containing:
• id - unique record identifier
• data - the stored data object
• created_at - timestamp when stored

Tip: Connect filter input dynamically from other nodes for conditional queries.

properties.name: Filter (JSON)
properties.description: Filter criteria as JSON (used if no input connected)
